rules.description: Must be locked out and tagged before downstream pipe removal.
rules.source_paragraph: Prior to any pipe maintenance on the cooling loop, valve V-104 shall be closed, locked out, and tagged in accordance with the plant LOTO program. Verify zero energy state before proceeding.

rules.description: Torque bonnet bolts to 45 Nm in a star pattern.
rules.source_paragraph: When reassembling V-104, torque the bonnet bolts to 45 Nm following a star/cross pattern in two passes to ensure even seating of the gasket.
All isolation of V-104 must comply with OSHA Standard 1910.147 (The Control of Hazardous Energy).
Pump P-201A bearings require re-lubrication with ISO VG 68 oil every 400 operating hours. Do not over-fill; maintain the oil sight glass at the center mark.

rules.description: Confirm suction valve V-104 open before start to avoid dry-run.
rules.source_paragraph: Before starting P-201A, confirm suction valve V-104 is fully open. Running the pump dry will destroy the mechanical seal within seconds.
P-201A is covered equipment under the facility's OSHA 1910.119 Process Safety Management mechanical integrity program.
